implementation_log: Revised the per-symbol backtest exit handling to keep T14 narrowly scoped. Added holding_bar_count to open-position state, switched max-holding evaluation to bar-backed counts, changed stop-loss and take-profit to use inclusive comparisons against current bar.close and average entry price, and updated SymbolBacktestEngine so raw intents pass through unchanged unless a close trigger is actually selected. Preserved full-position deterministic close replacement when a trigger fires and kept flat-position raw sell behavior intact under configured exit rules.
test_execution_summary: Static validation only. Targeted diagnostics reported no errors in the modified files: src/tw_quant/backtest/exits.py, src/tw_quant/backtest/engine.py, and tests/test_tw_quant_backtest_exits.py. Runtime tests were not executed in this revision.
summary: T14 revision is implemented with localized engine and exit-rule fixes plus targeted tests covering holding_bar_count semantics, close-price inclusive thresholds, no-trigger raw-intent pass-through, and flat-position sell compatibility.
next_action: Send implementation to Manager for QA validation.
